svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Basic Definitions and Terminology
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Graph Node -->
  <rect x="100" y="100" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node/Vertex
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Edge connecting nodes -->
  <path d="M180 120 C 240 80, 300 120, 340 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="260" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Edge
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Second Node -->
  <rect x="300" y="100" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Node/Vertex
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Weight label on edge -->
  <circle cx="260" cy="100" r="15" fill="white" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="260" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Graph label -->
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-style="italic" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Graph = Collection of vertices/nodes connected by edges
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Directed vs Undirected -->
  <text x="100" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Directed Edge
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="340" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Undirected Edge
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Undirected edge example -->
  <line x1="280" y1="240" x2="340" y2="240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="280" y1="240" x2="340" y2="240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Directed edge example -->
  <path d="M60 240 L100 240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
